violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to have food safety manager renew FMC license with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door soda cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

The facility is lacking in-date test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips with a current expiration date. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by trash barrel. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Employee moved trash barrel at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/19/2023
